recommendations.title: Life After Beth
recommendations.overview: Zach is devastated by the unexpected death of his girlfriend, Beth. When she mysteriously returns, he gets a second chance at love. Soon his whole world turns upside down...

recommendations.title: The Little Hours

recommendations.title: Horse Girl
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward woman with a fondness for arts and crafts, horses, and supernatural crime shows finds her increasingly lucid dreams trickling into her waking life.

recommendations.title: Joshy
recommendations.overview: After his engagement ends badly, Josh decides to take advantage of his bachelor-party plans in Ojai, California, with the few friends still willing to join him. Focused on drugs and their own hangups, his self-absorbed friends refuse to confront the

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: The Hundred-Foot Journey
recommendations.overview: A story centered around an Indian family who moves to France and opens a restaurant across the street from a Michelin-starred French restaurant.

recommendations.title: Upgraded

recommendations.title: My Boyfriend's Meds
recommendations.overview: A Woman's island getaway with her boyfriend is thrown for a loop when he forgets to take his prescription medications along.

recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.
